emails.subject: VEPCO
emails.body: VEPCO When: Monday, November 19, 2001 3:00 PM-4:00 PM (GMT-06:00) Central Time (US Canada). Where: Enron South, 6th floor

emails.subject: VEPCO
emails.body: In the interest of moving things forward, it would help if you could provide the following info: 1. Hand-marked copy of the portions of the current contract which need to be changed. 2. A brief description of the new deal, especially the index language. I know VEPCO may be preparing a first draft, but I think it would be good to get some focus ahead of time. Kay

emails.subject: RE: VEPCO
emails.body: RE: VEPCO Absolutely! Almost all of the original contract will go away, but Rahil and I will go through it first thing in the morning and mark it up for you. I know Rahil has language regarding the index from one of the traders that we will forward as well. H

emails.subject: RE: VEPCO
emails.body: Good. Gives us something productive to do!

emails.subject: VEPCO
emails.body: VEPCO Could you send me the notice of default and our response? Thanks!

emails.subject: Re: VEPCO
emails.body: Re: VEPCO Yes! Do you need it today or can it wait untilmonday? Heather Kroll Sent: Sat Dec 01 09:43:15 2001
